mapper.sql: id, task_id, task_name, task_type, ds_id, trigger_type, trigger_user, start_time, end_time, elapsed_ms, status, progress, log_content, error_msg, deleted, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM monitor_task_execution WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM monitor_task_execution WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
